text.message: Wow...didn't see I was even in a geame
You are making it so easy for black
If you are trading him devs then yes
Yeah last 3 steals were from blue, gotta balance
I won't have army or road
White is coming for army, blue is going for road through the middle.
Don't see how ripping me twice now was ever the move for you.
I mean, denying you road is a good step, so might be premature to call gg.  Unless you have a mono there.
White shows as gray in chat
Maybe the 11. He doesn't need much sheep
